name: typescript-strict-mode

description: Model recoverable failures with Result, thiserror enums, anyhow for applications, and context chains for actionable Rust error messages.

name: go-concurrency-channels-select

name: sql-query-optimization
description: Tune PostgreSQL queries with EXPLAIN ANALYZE, index-only scans, join order hints, and statistics updates for predictable latency.

name: react-hooks-performance
description: Stabilize React renders using useMemo, useCallback, useRef, and dependency arrays without over-memoizing or hiding stale closure bugs.

name: vue-composables-patterns
description: Build reusable Vue 3 composables with ref, computed, watchEffect, and inject for shared state without polluting the global store.

name: svelte-stores-writable-derived
description: Compose Svelte stores with writable, derived, and custom stores for predictable reactive data flow in SvelteKit applications.

name: docker-multi-stage-builds

name: kubernetes-pods-resources-probes
description: Define Kubernetes Deployments with requests, limits, liveness, readiness, and startup probes for stable rollouts under load.

name: terraform-modules-reuse
description: Author Terraform modules with clear variables, outputs, remote state backends, and workspace patterns for AWS and GCP infrastructure.

name: github-actions-ci-matrix
description: Configure GitHub Actions workflows with reusable workflows, caching, concurrency groups, and matrix builds across Node and Python versions.

name: gitlab-ci-cache-artifacts
description: Speed GitLab CI pipelines with cache keys, artifacts between stages, parallel jobs, and protected branch rules for release automation.

name: helm-charts-best-practices
description: Package Kubernetes apps with Helm charts, values layering, hooks, and semver releases while keeping secrets out of committed values files.

name: nginx-reverse-proxy-ssl
description: Tune Nginx reverse proxies with TLS certificates, HTTP/2, gzip, upstream health checks, and rate limiting for public APIs.

name: systemd-service-units

name: prompt-engineering-structured
description: Design LLM prompts with clear roles, few-shot examples, JSON schema outputs, and guardrails to reduce hallucinations in production chat flows.

name: rag-pipeline-chunking
description: Build RAG systems with semantic chunking, metadata filters, hybrid BM25 plus vector search, and citation-friendly retrieval over PDFs.

name: mcp-server-typescript-transport
description: Implement MCP servers in TypeScript with stdio and SSE transports, tool schemas, and structured logging for IDE and agent integrations.

name: agent-tool-loops-retry
description: Orchestrate autonomous agents with tool calling loops, exponential backoff, idempotent actions, and human-in-the-loop escalation policies.

name: embedding-strategies-openai-voyage
description: Choose embedding models, normalization, batching, and dimensionality tradeoffs for OpenAI, Voyage, and open-source sentence transformers.

name: fine-tuning-data-prep
description: Prepare supervised fine-tuning datasets with deduplication, PII redaction, train-validation splits, and JSONL formats for LoRA workflows.

name: nextjs-app-router-ssr-streaming
description: Ship Next.js App Router pages with React Server Components, streaming SSR, Suspense boundaries, and edge-friendly caching headers.

name: accessibility-audit-wcag
description: Run WCAG-focused accessibility audits with keyboard navigation, focus order, color contrast checks, and screen reader labels for complex widgets.

name: core-web-vitals-optimization
description: Improve LCP, INP, and CLS with image priority hints, font loading, layout shift fixes, and RUM dashboards in production.

name: api-rate-limiting-redis
description: Protect HTTP APIs with token bucket rate limits backed by Redis, per-user keys, and graceful 429 responses with Retry-After headers.

name: websocket-patterns-reconnect
description: Design resilient WebSocket clients with heartbeat pings, exponential reconnect, backpressure handling, and auth token refresh over wss.

name: postgresql-indexing-strategies
description: Choose B-tree, GiST, GIN, and partial indexes in PostgreSQL with covering indexes and concurrent CREATE INDEX for zero-downtime schema work.

name: redis-caching-session-stampede
description: Implement Redis caching with TTL jitter, single-flight stampede protection, and cache-aside patterns for hot read-heavy microservices.

name: database-migrations-safe
description: Ship zero-downtime database migrations using expand-contract patterns, backfills, feature flags, and rollback plans for PostgreSQL tables.

name: etl-pipelines-airflow-dbt
description: Orchestrate ETL with Apache Airflow DAGs, dbt models, incremental loads, and data quality tests across warehouses like Snowflake and BigQuery.

name: time-series-queries
description: Write efficient time-series SQL with window functions, downsampling, retention policies, and TimescaleDB hypertables for metrics dashboards.

name: jwt-authentication-rotation
description: Harden JWT authentication with short-lived access tokens, refresh rotation, audience and issuer claims, and asymmetric signing keys.

name: secrets-management-vault
description: Centralize secrets with HashiCorp Vault KV engines, dynamic database credentials, lease renewal, and Kubernetes auth for pod identities.

name: owasp-top-10-mitigations
description: Map OWASP Top 10 risks to concrete mitigations covering injection, broken access control, SSRF, and insecure deserialization in APIs.

name: content-security-policy-headers
description: Deploy strict Content-Security-Policy headers with nonces, trusted types, and report-only mode to block XSS while preserving third-party scripts.

name: dependency-auditing-ci
description: Automate dependency auditing with npm audit, pnpm overrides, SBOM exports, and CI gates that block known critical CVEs before deploy.

name: code-review-checklist
description: Run thorough pull request reviews covering correctness, tests, security, performance, and documentation with constructive feedback templates.

name: incident-response-runbook
description: Coordinate production incidents with severity tiers, communication channels, rollback steps, and blameless postmortems tied to action items.

name: architecture-decision-records
description: Capture architecture decision records in Markdown with context, decision, consequences, and status for traceable design evolution across teams.

name: pair-programming-driver-navigator

name: property-based-testing-fastcheck

name: e2e-testing-playwright
description: Build reliable Playwright end-to-end suites with fixtures, trace viewers, network mocking, and flaky test quarantine strategies in CI.

name: load-testing-k6-thresholds
description: Design k6 load tests with ramping scenarios, percentile thresholds, distributed execution, and correlation with metrics and tracing backends.

name: snapshot-testing-jest-vitest
